info.title: BulkPublish API
info.description: Publish to 11 social media platforms from a single API.

apiKey.name: Authorization
apiKey.description: API key from Settings > API Keys. Pass as `Bearer bp_your_key_here`

platformSpecific.description: Per-platform options. Keys are platform names. Facebook: { shareToStory }. Instagram: { collaborators, shareToStory, trialReel, graduationStrategy ('manual'|'auto'), thumbnailTimestamp (seconds) }. TikTok: { privacyLevel ('PUBLIC_TO_EVERYONE'|'MUTUAL_FOLLOW_FRIENDS'|'FOLLOWER_OF_CREATOR'|'SELF_ONLY'|'SEND_TO_USER_INBOX'), disableDuet, disableStitch, disableComment, isAigc, brandContentToggle, brandOrganicToggle, thumbnailTimestamp }. YouTube: { title, privacyStatus, categoryId, madeForKids, playlistId, thumbnailUrl }. Pinterest: { title, description, link, [channelId]: { boardId } }. GMB: { ctaType, ctaUrl, eventTitle, startDate, startTime, endDate, endTime, couponCode, redeemOnlineUrl, termsConditions }. X: { replySettings ('everyone'|'following'|'mentionedUsers') }. Threads: { quotePostId }. Use _firstComment (string) for auto-posted reply after publish.

recurringSchedule.description: Full recurring schedule details when linked

secret.description: HMAC secret for signature verification (shown once on create)

PlatformSpecific.description: Per-platform options. Keys are platform names. Facebook: { shareToStory }. Instagram: { collaborators, shareToStory, trialReel, graduationStrategy ('manual'|'auto'), thumbnailTimestamp (seconds) }. TikTok: { privacyLevel ('PUBLIC_TO_EVERYONE'|'MUTUAL_FOLLOW_FRIENDS'|'FOLLOWER_OF_CREATOR'|'SELF_ONLY'|'SEND_TO_USER_INBOX'), disableDuet, disableStitch, disableComment, isAigc, brandContentToggle, brandOrganicToggle, thumbnailTimestamp }. YouTube: { title, privacyStatus, categoryId, madeForKids, playlistId, thumbnailUrl }. Pinterest: { title, description, link, [channelId]: { boardId } }. GMB: { ctaType, ctaUrl, eventTitle, startDate, startTime, endDate, endTime, couponCode, redeemOnlineUrl, termsConditions }. X: { replySettings ('everyone'|'following'|'mentionedUsers') }. Threads: { quotePostId }. Use _firstComment (string) for auto-posted reply after publish.

replySettings.description: Who can reply to this tweet

tags.name: Posts
tags.description: Create, schedule, publish, and manage posts across platforms

tags.name: Channels
tags.description: Connect and manage social media accounts

tags.name: Media
tags.description: Upload and manage images and videos

tags.name: Analytics
tags.description: View engagement metrics and performance data

tags.name: Labels
tags.description: Organize posts and media with labels

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Manage webhook subscriptions. Note: webhook delivery for post events is coming soon.

tags.name: API Keys
tags.description: Manage API authentication keys. Available on all plans (Free: 1 key, Pro: 5, Business: 10).

tags.name: Mentions
tags.description: Search for users to @mention in posts

get.description: Retrieve posts with pagination, filtering, and search.

parameters.name: labelIds
parameters.description: **optional** — Comma-separated label IDs to filter by

parameters.name: labelId
parameters.description: **optional** — Filter by single label ID (legacy, prefer labelIds)

parameters.name: labelMode
parameters.description: **optional** — How to combine label filters (default: or)

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: **optional** — Filter posts created on or after this date

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: **optional** — Filter posts created on or before this date

parameters.name: scheduledFrom
parameters.description: **optional** — Filter posts scheduled on or after this date

parameters.name: scheduledTo
parameters.description: **optional** — Filter posts scheduled on or before this date

parameters.name: recurring
parameters.description: **optional** — Set to "true" to filter recurring posts only

post.description:
Create a new post as draft or scheduled. Validates character limits per platform, media ownership, channel ownership, and plan quotas.

**Character limits:** X: 280, Bluesky: 300, Threads: 500, Mastodon: 500, Pinterest: 500, GMB: 1500, Instagram: 2200, TikTok: 2200, LinkedIn: 3000, YouTube: 5000, Facebook: 63206

content.description: Post text content (optional if media attached)

channels.description: Required. Target channels to publish to

mediaFiles.description: Optional. Media file IDs from POST /api/media

postTypeOverrides.description: Optional. Per-platform post type override. Values: `story` (Facebook/Instagram), `reel` (Instagram), `pdf_carousel` (LinkedIn), etc. Example: `{ "instagram": "story" }`

platformContent.description: Optional. Per-platform content overrides, e.g. { "x": "Short version" }

deleteMediaAfterPublish.description: Optional. Delete uploaded media after publishing (default: true)

threadParts.description: Optional. Required when postFormat is 'thread' (min 2 parts)

autoPlugEnabled.description: Optional. Auto-post a comment when the post reaches a like threshold

autoPlugText.description: Optional. The promotional comment text for auto-plug

autoPlugThreshold.description: Optional. Number of likes to trigger auto-plug (default: 50)

autoRepostEnabled.description: Optional. Auto-repost/reshare when the post reaches a like threshold

autoRepostThreshold.description: Optional. Number of likes to trigger auto-repost (default: 100)

get.description: Returns full post details including recurringScheduleId and recurringSchedule when the post is linked to a recurring schedule.

put.description: Update a draft, scheduled, failed, or partial post.

get.description: Per-platform engagement metrics with history snapshots.

post.description: Publish the post's first media as a Facebook or Instagram Story (disappears after 24h). The post must have media and a published platform entry for the target platform.

400.description: Invalid platform, no media, or no matching platform entry

get.description: Returns the next available time slot for scheduling a post based on your queue settings.
Returns all connected channels including tokenExpiresAt and metadata per channel.

post.description: Connect a LinkedIn organization page as a new channel. Requires an existing LinkedIn personal channel.

channelId.description: ID of the existing LinkedIn personal channel

post.description: Upload an image or video file. Max 100MB. Formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, MP4, QuickTime, WebM.

get.description: Redirects to the thumbnail URL for the given media file.

404.description: Media not found or no thumbnail available

get.description: Post counts by status, platform, and day.
Impressions, reach, likes, comments, shares, saves, clicks, video views with per-platform breakdown and top posts. Results are cached for 5 minutes.

200.description: Engagement data including totalImpressions, totalReach, totalLikes, totalComments, totalShares, totalSaves, totalClicks, totalVideoViews, avgEngagementRate, byPlatform, byDay, topPosts

post.description: Queue a background job to fetch latest metrics from all platforms and invalidate analytics cache.

get.description: Daily snapshots of followers, impressions, reach, and profile views per connected channel. Data is synced automatically every 4 hours.
Returns all webhook subscriptions for the current organization.

post.description: Create a new webhook subscription. The secret is returned once on creation for HMAC signature verification.

url.description: HTTPS endpoint to receive webhook payloads

events.description: Event types to subscribe to (e.g. post.published, post.failed)

secret.description: Optional. Custom HMAC secret. Auto-generated if omitted.

put.description: Update webhook URL, events, or active status.

get.description: Returns today's API call count, daily limit based on plan, and per-key breakdown. Daily limits: Free 100, Pro 5,000, Business 50,000.

200.description: Usage data with today's count, limit, plan, and per-key breakdown

get.description: Returns daily API call counts for the last N days (default 30, max 90). Includes today's live count from Redis + historical data from DB.

put.description: Owner only. Updates the organization name.

delete.description: Owner only. Requires confirmation by sending the organization name in the request body. Permanently deletes the organization and all associated data (posts, media, channels, schedules, metrics). Cannot delete the user's last organization. Does NOT cancel Polar subscription.

confirmName.description: Must exactly match the organization name

400.description: Confirmation required or cannot delete last organization

get.description: Fetch OpenGraph metadata from a URL. SSRF-protected.
Current usage vs limits for all resource types on your plan.
Search for users on a specific platform to @mention in post content. Currently supported on X (Twitter) and Bluesky. Other platforms return an empty array.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: **required** — Search query (username or display name, max 100 chars)

404.description: Channel not found or not owned by user
